primary_reason: Literature supports method and architecture selection, but constants, source envelopes, property modes, pressure basis, and row-specific admissibility remain incomplete.
thesis_usable_evidence: negative component-K result should be published as diagnostic evidence
corner two-tap rows support section-effective residual reporting only
throughflow-plus-recirculation architecture is the preferred hybrid pressure route to test
heat-loss resistance network remains setup-only until source/sink labels are complete

blocked_or_deferred_lanes.component_K: blocked by reverse-flow gate, component isolation, and same-QOI UQ requirements
blocked_or_deferred_lanes.F6_friction_re_correction: blocked until low-recirculation/nonrecirculating anchors or explicit hybrid pressure modeling pass
blocked_or_deferred_lanes.internal_Nu: blocked until source envelopes, boundary classes, and external heat-loss ownership are resolved
blocked_or_deferred_lanes.unsteady_and_ROM: parked future lanes pending temporal or snapshot sufficiency
